mission.title: ollama: Support for OpenAI Responses API (for Codex CLI compatibility)
mission.description: Support for OpenAI Responses API (for Codex CLI compatibility). Requested by 60+ users.

steps.title: Check current Ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your Ollama version:
```bash
ollama version
```
This feature requires a recent Ollama version with Responses API support.

steps.title: Review Codex CLI compatibility
steps.description: The [OpenAI Codex CLI](https://github.com/openai/codex) uses the `/v1/responses` endpoint for agent-like terminal functionality. This PR adds basic support for the `/v1/responses` endpoint to enable Codex CLI compatibility with Ollama.

steps.title: Configure Codex CLI with Ollama
steps.description:
Configure Codex CLI to use Ollama:
```bash
export OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1
export OPENAI_API_KEY=ollama
```
Then run Codex CLI as usual. See the [source PR](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/10316) for implementation details.

steps.title: Verify Codex CLI works with Ollama
steps.description:
Test that Codex CLI can communicate with Ollama. Ensure a model is running:
```bash
ollama list
```
Then test with Codex CLI to confirm agent-like terminal functionality works.

resolution.summary: Basic support for the /v1/responses endpoint was added to Ollama, enabling compatibility with OpenAI Codex CLI.

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
